name: RPC Provider Selection
description: Choose the right Solana RPC provider for your project

tree.question: What features do you need beyond basic RPC?

DAS API (compressed NFTs, token metadata.rationale: Helius is the only provider with full DAS (Digital Asset Standard) API support. Required for compressed NFTs, token metadata queries, and getAssetsByOwner.
DAS API (compressed NFTs, token metadata.setup: Sign up at helius.dev. Free tier: 100k credits/day (~30 RPC calls/sec).
DAS API (compressed NFTs, token metadata.cost: Free: 100k credits/day. Developer: $49/mo (5M credits). Business: $499/mo (50M credits).
DAS API (compressed NFTs, token metadata.when_to_upgrade: If you're hitting rate limits on the free tier (429 errors).

Webhooks (real-time notifications on pro.rationale: Helius has native webhook support. Create webhooks that fire on any program interaction, account change, or transaction type.
Webhooks (real-time notifications on pro.setup: Sign up at helius.dev. Use Helius SDK or REST API to create webhooks.
Webhooks (real-time notifications on pro.cost: Free tier includes webhooks. Enhanced webhooks on paid plans.
Webhooks (real-time notifications on pro.when_to_upgrade: When you need enhanced transaction parsing or >10 webhooks.

$0 — need free high throughput.rationale: Solana public RPC (api.mainnet-beta.solana.com) is free but heavily rate-limited. Fine for development, not for production.
$0 — need free high throughput.when_to_upgrade: Immediately when you go to production. Public RPC will drop your requests.

$50-500/mo.rationale: Helius Developer or Business plan. Best overall value for Solana with DAS + webhooks + high RPC throughput.
$50-500/mo.when_to_upgrade: When you need dedicated nodes (>50M credits/mo).

$500+/mo — need dedicated infrastructure.rationale: Triton (triton.one) provides dedicated Solana nodes. Lowest latency, highest throughput. Used by Jupiter, Marinade, and other top protocols.
$500+/mo — need dedicated infrastructure.setup: Contact triton.one for dedicated node setup.
$500+/mo — need dedicated infrastructure.when_to_upgrade: When you need custom configurations or geographic distribution.

Just basic RPC — send transactions, read.question: Is this for development or production?

Development / testing.rationale: Helius free tier is the best default for development. 100k credits/day covers all dev needs. You also get DAS API and webhooks to experiment with.
Development / testing.when_to_upgrade: When you launch to production and need reliability guarantees.

Production.rationale: Helius Developer plan for most apps. Reliable, fast, includes everything you need.
Production.setup: Sign up at helius.dev, upgrade to Developer plan.

devnet_note: For devnet: use https://api.devnet.solana.com (free, no signup) or Helius devnet endpoint. Devnet never needs a paid RPC.
